rows.label: qev051402_MSG0001
rows.name: I have been waiting eagerly, Sir BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051402_MSG0002
rows.name: Let's get straight to it. Please tell me the results of your battle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051402_MSG0003
rows.name:
This is...
the entirety of the new weapon the Growth was developing...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051402_MSG0004
rows.name:
I cannot be certain without a detailed analysis,
but it appears to be a firearm with considerable range.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051402_MSG0005
rows.name:
If we allow it to be completed, it would undoubtedly become
a threat that NLA cannot ignore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051402_MSG0006
rows.name: We must respond urgently... I will contact NLA immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051402_MSG0007
rows.name:
As someone who actually saw the inside of the fortress,
I would like your input as well.
Will you attend the strategy meeting with us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051402_MSG0008
rows.name:
Reporting in!
We just received word that an army, believed to be the Growth,
is marching toward our position...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051402_MSG0009
rows.name:
The Growth is attacking?!
Could their target be these blueprints...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051402_MSG0010
rows.name:
There's no point in them trying to take them back now...
Most likely, this is out of spite for having them stolen,
or to eliminate anyone who has seen the information...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051402_MSG0011
rows.name:
Whatever the case, the contents of these blueprints
seem to be incredibly important to the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051402_MSG0012
rows.name:
In that case, we will protect this information at all costs!
Intercept them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051402_MSG0013
rows.name:
I apologize for dragging you into this,
but I must ask for your cooperation as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051402_MSG0014
rows.name:
It is nothing short of bad luck, but our main forces
are away on an expedition against the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051402_MSG0015
rows.name:
With our main strength absent,
the defense forces currently here are
at an overwhelming disadvantage![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051402_MSG0016
rows.name: Either way, it seems we missed the window to escape![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051402_MSG0017
rows.name:
There is a man named Gi Nogan outside.
Please follow his instructions regarding combat within the camp.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051402_MSG0018
rows.name: Now, let us go![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051402_MSG0019
rows.name:
The battle has already begun!
Hurry to the front lines![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051402_MSG0020
rows.name: Speak to Gi Nogan regarding combat within the camp![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051402_MSG0021
rows.name: I am counting on you![ST:wait ]
